folio.label: 55r
folio.l: And therfore he , of ful auysement
Nolde neuäe wryte , in none of hise sermouns
Ne I wyl noon reherce , if æat I may
But of my tale , how shal I don this day
Me were lotú , be likned doutelees
To muses , that men clepe pierides
But natheles , I recche not a bene
Thougú I come after hi~ , witú hawe bake
I speke in prose , and lat hi~ rymes make
And with that word , he with a sober chere
Bygan his tale , as ©e shuln after here

note.notetxt: 98/1the incipit is written with the same colour of the text.ODR
